hero.title: Send Items Safely with Verified Traveler
hero.subtitle: Bondrro is a people-powered delivery app that connects senders with verified travelers to deliver items.

what_is.p1: Bondrro is a trusted crowd delivery app that connects people who want to send parcels or documents with verified travelers heading to the same destination.
what_is.p2: By using free luggage or car space on existing trips, Bondrro enables faster deliveries than traditional courier services.
what_is.p3: Senders can deliver with confidence, while travelers earn during trips they already take, making each journey more rewarding and sustainable by reducing additional CO₂ emissions.

trust.title: Your Trust & Safety Come
trust.subtitle: We’ve built multiple protection layers to make every delivery secure, transparent, and reliable. From delivery to payment, Bondrro protects both senders and travellers throughout the journey.

escrow.title: Escrow Payment Protection
escrow.desc: Travellers get paid only once the item is successfully delivered and confirmed.

identity.title: Identity Verification
identity.desc: All users are verified to ensure a trusted and accountable community.

review.title: Mutual Review System
review.desc: Both senders and travellers review each other after delivery to maintain quality and trust.

pricing.title: Fair & Transparent Pricing
pricing.desc: Senders and travellers agree on pricing together — clear, flexible, and fair.

tracking.title: Real-Time Tracking
tracking.desc: Track your delivery progress directly in the app at every step.

insurance.title: Insurance Coverage
insurance.desc: Optional insurance protects your items for extra peace of mind.

support.title: 24/7 Customer Support
support.desc: Our support team is available whenever you need help.

why.subtitle: A smarter, faster, and more human way to send and deliver items. Built around real journeys, real people, and real trust.

fast_delivery.title: Fast Delivery
fast_delivery.desc: Deliver items using real journeys locally or internationally, often within hours or a day.

affordable.title: Affordable Pricing
affordable.desc: Senders and travellers agree on fair pricing directly, with no hidden fees or inflated courier costs.

trusted.title: Trusted Network
trusted.desc: Verified users, mutual reviews, and clear accountability at every step of the delivery.

guarantee.title: Delivery Guarantee
guarantee.desc: Payment is released only after delivery confirmation — or you receive a full refund.

eco.title: Eco-Friendly Delivery
eco.desc: Reduce CO₂ emissions by using existing travel routes instead of creating new transport.

simple_app.title: Simple App Experience
simple_app.desc: Post shipments or trips, communicate, track, and confirm deliveries easily in one intuitive app.

flexible.title: Flexible Timing
flexible.desc: From same-day deliveries to planned trips, choose what fits your schedule.

end_to_end.title: End-to-End Delivery
end_to_end.desc: Direct delivery from sender to traveller, without middlemen or unnecessary handling.

emissions.p1: Bondrro is built around a simple idea: Use journeys that already exist.
emissions.p2: By connecting senders with travelers who are already on the move, Bondrro helps reduce unnecessary transport and avoid creating new delivery routes.

referral.subtitle_part1: Invite your friends to Bondrro and get

newsletter.title: Join Bondrro Community
newsletter.subtitle: Get updates on new features, delivery tips, & exclusives offers
newsletter.consent: I agree to receive newsletters from Bondrro. I can unsubscribe at any time. View our Privacy Policy

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: We're here to help. Send us a message and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

success.desc: Our support team will review your message and get back to you within 24 hours.

hero.title: How Bondrro Works?
hero.subtitle: Whether you want to send an item or travel & earn, Bondrro makes it simple, secure, and transparent from start to finish.

senders.title: For Senders
senders.subtitle: A secure, app-based process that keeps you in control from start to finish.

step1.title: Create Your Account
step1.desc: Sign up and complete ID verification to join a trusted community.

step2.title: Post Your Shipment
step2.desc: Post your shipment including item details, weight, and delivery destination.

step3.title: Find a Match
step3.desc: Browse available trips or receive route suggestions that match your destination.

step4.title: Confirm Pricing & Secure Payment
step4.desc: Agree on a price with traveler for the delivery. Payment is securely held in escrow until successful delivery.

step5.title: Receive Your Delivery
step5.desc: Coordinate pickup and drop-off, track the shipment in real time, and confirm delivery once received.

travelers.title: For Travelers
travelers.subtitle: No extra travel required. Simply carry items along your existing route and get paid.

step1.title: Create Your Account
step1.desc: Sign up and complete ID verification for a secure experience.

step2.title: Post Your Trip
step2.desc: Post your trip details including travel dates, route, and the types of items you're willing to carry.

step3.title: Find a Match
step3.desc: Explore matching shipment requests or receive smart suggestions based on your travel route.

step4.title: Confirm Pricing & Arrange Delivery
step4.desc: Confirm the delivery price with the sender and coordinate pickup and drop-off arrangements.

step5.title: Receive & Get Paid
step5.desc: Deliver the item safely. Once delivery is confirmed, your payment is released automatically.

cta.subtitle: Download the app now & set up your profile in just 2 minutes
cta.faq_link: Do you have any questions? Find answers in our FAQ

hero.title: Do You Have Questions?
hero.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions below
hero.contact_text: If you still need help, contact us.

sender.q1: How do I send an item using Bondrro?
sender.a1: Simply create an account, verify your identity, and post a shipment request. Verified travelers heading the same way can send offers, or you can choose from matching trips. Once you agree on the price, payment is secured in escrow until delivery is confirmed.
sender.q2: How do I know the traveler is trustworthy?
sender.a2: All travelers on Bondrro go through identity verification (KYC).
sender.q3: How fast can my item be delivered?

a3.p1: Delivery speed depends on the traveler’s existing route. Many deliveries happen:
a3.bullet2: Domestic: same day or within a few hours
a3.p2: Because items travel along real journeys already happening, delivery is often faster than traditional couriers.

sender.a4: Yes. Bondrro provides real-time progress updates and in-app communication with the traveler so you always know the delivery status.
sender.q5: What happens if my item is not delivered?
sender.a5: Your payment is protected through escrow. The traveler only receives payment after delivery confirmation. If delivery fails, Bondrro’s dispute resolution process reviews the case and may issue a full refund according to platform policies.
sender.q6: How is the delivery price decided?
sender.a6: Prices are agreed between sender and traveler through the platform.
sender.q7: Do I need to meet the traveler personally?

a7.p1: Pickup and drop-off arrangements are flexible. You can:
a7.bullet3: Agree on a safe meeting point
a7.bullet4: Or send the items by post to the traveler for pickup

sender.q8: Can I cancel a shipment request?
sender.a8: Yes. You can cancel before a traveler accepts or before payment confirmation. Cancellation policies may apply after agreements are finalized.

traveler.q1: How can I earn money as a traveler?
traveler.a1: Post your planned trip and available luggage space. Senders requesting deliveries along your route can match with you. Alternatively, you can send delivery requests for items that match your delivery route and luggage capacity. After successful delivery confirmation, your payment is released automatically.
traveler.q2: Do I need to travel extra distances?
traveler.a2: No. Bondrro is designed for journeys you are already taking. You simply carry items along your existing route.
traveler.q3: How do I become a verified traveler?
traveler.a3: You must complete identity verification through our trusted third party. This ensures safety for everyone on the platform.
traveler.q4: What if something goes wrong during delivery?
traveler.a4: Bondrro provides support and dispute resolution. Communication records and delivery confirmations help fairly resolve any issue.
traveler.a5: Your payment is held securely in escrow and released automatically once both sender and traveler confirm successful delivery.
traveler.a6: Yes. You are free to accept or decline any request. You control what you carry and when.
traveler.q7: Am I responsible for customs or regulations?
traveler.a7: Yes. Travelers must comply with local laws and customs regulations of the destination. Always verify item legality before accepting a delivery.

payment.q1: How does payment work on Bondrro?
payment.a1: After sender and traveler agree on a price, the sender pays through the app. The payment is held securely in escrow until delivery is completed and confirmed.

a2.p1: Escrow means Bondrro safely holds the payment during delivery.
a2.bullet1: Traveler is guaranteed payment after successful delivery.
a2.bullet2: Sender is protected if delivery fails.

payment.a3: Payment is automatically released once delivery confirmation is completed by both parties.
payment.a4: Yes. Bondrro charges a transparent platform fee to support secure payments, verification, and platform operations. Fees are shown before payment confirmation.
payment.q5: What happens if a dispute occurs?

a5.p2: A fair resolution is made, which may include refunds or payment adjustments.

payment.a6: Yes. Bondrro uses encrypted payment processing and secure infrastructure to protect your financial data.

a7.bullet3: disputes are resolved in your favor

payment.a8: No. Bondrro follows transparent pricing — all costs are displayed before payment.
payment.a9: Yes. Payments are processed digitally, allowing cross-border deliveries while maintaining secure transactions.

hero.title: About Bondrro
hero.desc: Bondrro connects people who want to send items with verified travelers already heading in the same direction. We believe delivery can be faster, more affordable, and more personal — without adding extra transport routes.

why.title: Why We Created Bondrro?
why.p1: Sending something to someone you care about shouldn’t feel complicated or impersonal.
why.p2: We created Bondrro to make delivery more human. Instead of relying only on traditional courier systems, we saw an opportunity in journeys already happening every day.
why.p3: We built a secure way to connect them.
why.p4: Bondrro was created to reduce distance between people — not just physically, but emotionally.

idea.title: The Idea
idea.desc: Seeing millions of travelers with unused space and people needing deliveries

dev.title: Development
dev.desc: Building trust infrastructure: KYC, escrow payment, reviews, & dispute resolution

launch.title: Launch
launch.desc: Connecting senders and travelers across cities and borders via Bondrro mobile app

mission.desc: To make sending and traveling more connected, accessible, and human. We aim to simplify delivery while building trust between people across cities and countries.

vision.desc: To build the world’s most trusted crowd-powered delivery network where every journey creates value and people empower each other across borders.

trust.title: Trust First
trust.desc: Safety, transparency, and verification guide every decision.

fairness.title: Fairness & Transparency
fairness.desc: Clear pricing, escrow protection, and respectful interactions.

responsibility.title: Responsibility & Care
responsibility.desc: We protect items, people, and their experiences on the platform.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.desc: By using existing travel routes, we help reduce additional CO₂ emissions.

download_popup.subtitle: Scan the QR code and become part of our community!
